ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the organization */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., local government, private developer) */,
  "organisation_address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "organisation_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "organisation_email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization managing the site */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference identifier for the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Full name and address of the site */,
  "site_plan_url" TEXT /* URL to the site plan */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used for the site */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the site */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the site */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Area of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date the site was first added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the site was last updated */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate of the site */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate of the site */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the site (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "site_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the site (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning permission */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the permission is for */,
  "deliverable" TEXT /* Whether the site is deliverable */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current planning status of the site */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of planning permission */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "planning_history" INTEGER /* Number of previous planning applications */,
  "proposed_for_pip" INTEGER /* Whether the site is proposed for the Public Infrastructure Plan */,
  "min_net_dwellings" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings */,
  "development_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the development */,
  "non_housing_development" TEXT /* Non-housing development details */,
  "hazardous_substances" TEXT /* Hazardous substances present on the site */,
  "site_information" TEXT /* Additional site information */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and remarks */,
  "permission_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the permission expires */,
  "permission_amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last amended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_permissions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., public, private) */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date ownership began */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date ownership ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_ownership_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change or permission */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related planning permission */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_history_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_history_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES planning_permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., planning application, site plan) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created or uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site visit */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the visit */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "visitor_role" TEXT /* Role of the visitor (e.g., inspector, evaluator) */,
  "visit_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the visit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_visits_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., aerial, ground-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_images_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental data (e.g., air quality, soil contamination) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_environmental_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "financial_type" TEXT /* Type of financial data (e.g., estimated cost, actual cost) */,
  "financial_value" REAL /* Value of the financial data */,
  "financial_date" TEXT /* Date the financial data was recorded */,
  "financial_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial data */,
  "financial_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_financial_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder (e.g., developer, community representative) */,
  "stakeholder_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_organization" TEXT /* Organization the stakeholder represents */,
  "stakeholder_interest" TEXT /* Interest of the stakeholder in the site (e.g., financial, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_stakeholders_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commentor_name" TEXT /* Name of the commentor */,
  "commentor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the commentor */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_comments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "monitoring_date" TEXT /* Date of the monitoring */,
  "monitoring_type" TEXT /* Type of monitoring (e.g., compliance, progress) */,
  "monitoring_status" TEXT /* Status of the monitoring */,
  "monitoring_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the monitoring */,
  "monitoring_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the monitoring (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_monitoring_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk (e.g., environmental, financial) */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk */,
  "risk_probability" REAL /* Probability of the risk occurring */,
  "risk_impact" REAL /* Potential impact of the risk */,
  "risk_mitigation" TEXT /* Mitigation strategies for the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_risks_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "opportunity_type" TEXT /* Type of opportunity (e.g., economic, social) */,
  "opportunity_description" TEXT /* Description of the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_value" REAL /* Value of the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_timing" TEXT /* Timing of the opportunity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_opportunities_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric (e.g., progress, quality) */,
  "performance_target" REAL /* Target value for the performance metric */,
  "performance_actual" REAL /* Actual value for the performance metric */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_performance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
